---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or a meaningful change in behavior.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Pre-flight

- [ ] I read the README to confirm this isn't already supported.
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the file boundaries.
- [ ] I checked existing issues for duplicates.

## Problem

What's the situation today that this would fix? Be concrete. "My report has too many false positives in the open-contradictions bucket" beats "improve accuracy."

## Proposed solution

What you'd build or change. If you have a hunch which file should change (see the sources-of-truth table in CONTRIBUTING.md), name it.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about. Why they're worse.

## Scope check

- Does this require a new MCP integration? (Y/N)
- Does this require a new env var or config key? (Y/N)
- Does this affect the apply / undo flow? (Y/N)
- Does this affect cost per cycle? (Y/N — give an order of magnitude)

## Anything else

Mockup report snippets, related work, links.
